articles.title: What the Patriots are saying about Super Bowl rematch with Seahawks
articles.description:
"I think you always have a chip on your shoulder when you're going up against someone that you lost to the year before"

The post What the Patriots are saying about Super Bowl rematch with Seahawks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots prepare for Super Bowl rematch against Seahawks on May 20, 2026.
Players express motivation from previous loss, emphasizing a competitive edge.
Local fans anticipate heightened excitement and community engagement during the game.
